# GitHub Copilot Instructions

**Primary instructions are in `AGENTS.md` in this repository.**

This file exists because GitHub Copilot looks for this location by default.

## Copilot-Specific Instructions
- Follow all rules in AGENTS.md
- This is a shared library - keep it generic and reusable
- Keep API surfaces clean and well-documented
- Support both browser and server-side usage
- Test thoroughly before publishing
- Follow established patterns for Gemini integration

Please read `AGENTS.md` for complete instructions and workspace rules.
